title: City Twelve Hours Collage Poster AI
sourceTitle: City Twelve Hours Collage Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 3:4 twelve-hours city collage poster for Shanghai, showing one city shifting from early morning warmth to night atmosphere. Subject: Shanghai is presented through a full-day visual sequence; riverside skyline, lane houses, metro entrance, night food stall appear across the grid as recognizable city moments, local lifestyle scenes, transit, food, skyline, streets, river or night views. Scene: A premium cultural-travel magazine poster built as a 3-column by 4-row city collage, with each tile representing a different hour block from dawn to late night. Composition: Fixed 3x4 grid layout on a vertical 3:4 poster: twelve cinematic panels, clear time progression, balanced landmark distribution, title area for the city name, and subtitle reading the city plus Twelve Hours. Signature Elements: 3x4 time-grid, twelve city moments, Shanghai, riverside skyline, lane houses, metro entrance, night food stall, fixed source color palette with concrete palette cues from the prompt, documentary texture, cinematic travel grading, and premium cultural magazine layout. Fixed source details: Color Mood: warm gold to deep blue gradient. Style: City documentary collage with unified cinematic grading, premium travel magazine polish, high-end cultural tourism mood, real street-life texture, and collectible poster finish. Color Palette: fixed source color palette with concrete palette cues from the prompt guides the whole day-to-night transition, with warm dawn light, daytime neutrals, sunset glow, blue-hour depth, neon night accents, and consistent cinematic color harmony. Lighting: Each time block has distinct lighting, moving naturally from morning warmth through daytime clarity to evening glow and deep night blue, while the whole grid remains visually unified. Camera: Mixed documentary travel photography language: landmark wide shots, street-level details, food or transit moments, skyline views, and intimate local scenes arranged as one coherent poster. Typography: Readable title naming Shanghai, short time labels for the twelve-hour sequence, and a clean bilingual-style subtitle in the form of city name plus Twelve Hours. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Theme: Vertical 3:4 twelve-hours city collage poster for Lisbon, showing one city shifting from early morning warmth to night atmosphere. Subject: Lisbon is presented through a full-day visual sequence; yellow tram, azulejo tiles, hill streets, river view appear across the grid as recognizable city moments, local lifestyle scenes, transit, food, skyline, streets, river or night views. Scene: A premium cultural-travel magazine poster built as a 3-column by 4-row city collage, with each tile representing a different hour block from dawn to late night. Composition: Fixed 3x4 grid layout on a vertical 3:4 poster: twelve cinematic panels, clear time progression, balanced landmark distribution, title area for the city name, and subtitle reading the city plus Twelve Hours. Signature Elements: 3x4 time-grid, twelve city moments, Lisbon, yellow tram, azulejo tiles, hill streets, river view, fixed source color palette with concrete palette cues from the prompt, documentary texture, cinematic travel grading, and premium cultural magazine layout. Fixed source details: Color Mood: sun-washed blue and terracotta. Style: City documentary collage with unified cinematic grading, premium travel magazine polish, high-end cultural tourism mood, real street-life texture, and collectible poster finish. Color Palette: fixed source color palette with concrete palette cues from the prompt guides the whole day-to-night transition, with warm dawn light, daytime neutrals, sunset glow, blue-hour depth, neon night accents, and consistent cinematic color harmony. Lighting: Each time block has distinct lighting, moving naturally from morning warmth through daytime clarity to evening glow and deep night blue, while the whole grid remains visually unified. Camera: Mixed documentary travel photography language: landmark wide shots, street-level details, food or transit moments, skyline views, and intimate local scenes arranged as one coherent poster. Typography: Readable title naming Lisbon, short time labels for the twelve-hour sequence, and a clean bilingual-style subtitle in the form of city name plus Twelve Hours. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.
